articles.description: Chelsea enter freefall after another defeat - 3-0 away at Everton - and have two weeks over the international break to stew on a damaging 10 days.
articles.title: Chelsea decline: Who is to blame and how bad has it got?

articles.description: Arne Slot needs answers quickly or Liverpool's unwanted records may no longer be his only worry.
articles.title: Brighton 2-1 Liverpool: 'If Reds play like that at PSG it could be 10-0'

articles.description: Josh Kerr completes his post-injury return to the top of a global podium in thrilling fashion as he reclaims his world indoor 3,000m title.
articles.title: World Athletics Indoor Championships 2026: Josh Kerr reclaims 3,000m title

articles.description: The fight for Champions League football appears to be turning into one no-one wants to win, but have Everton snuck into the race?
articles.title: The race no-one wants to win – are Everton serious top-five contenders?

articles.description: Harry Kane scores to move within 10 of the Bundesliga single-season goals record set by Robert Lewandowski.
articles.title: Bayern Munich 4-0 Union Berlin: Harry Kane scores in Bayern win to edge closer to Bundesliga record

articles.description: Chaos clubs Tottenham Hotspur and Nottingham Forest are battling to survive in the Premier League - and face each other on Sunday.
articles.title: Premier League: Tottenham and Nottingham Forest ready to battle in top-flight relegation fight

articles.description: Movsar Evloev puts a huge dent in Lerone Murphy's featherweight title dream as the Russian secures a majority decision victory at UFC London.
articles.title: UFC London: Movsar Evloev beats Lerone Murphy to crush title hopes

articles.description: Tottenham boss Igor Tudor clears up the viral moment where it was thought he mistakenly hugged someone thinking it was Liverpool manager Arne Slot.
articles.title: Igor Tudor: Tottenham boss says he did not confuse Allan Taylor for Arne Slot

articles.description: Cameron Norrie and Katie Boulter are knocked out in the third round of the Miami Open, ending British hopes in the singles.
articles.title: Miami Open: Cameron Norrie, Katie Boulter & Fran Jones knocked out as British hopes in singles over

articles.description: Roma's Wesley Franca emerges as a target for Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea keen on Real Madrid midfielder Eduardo Camavinga while Marcus Rashford faces uncertain Barcelona future.
articles.title: Football gossip: Franca, Camavinga, Rashford, Guimaraes, Raphinha, Haaland, Rudiger, Ederson
